cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma about whether to go back to rehab or pretend to live a clean life to avoid disappointing the family. Let me start by breaking it down. First, the person is facing a relapse. They know going to rehab is the best solution, but they are worried about their family's reaction.
